modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Tests are failing due to missing LockDown Browser in the lab.

full_description_text: 
I was trying to take a test in our lab, but it didn't work. The answers were blank during the testing, and I found out that the LockDown Browser OEM Lab Edition is not installed in our lab. This is causing issues with the tests in the WebAssign, Pearson, and Aleks environments.
short_description: Tests are failing due to missing LockDown Browser in the lab.
description: I was trying to take a test in our lab, but it didn't work. The answers were blank during the testing, and I found out that the LockDown Browser OEM Lab Edition is not installed in our lab. This is causing issues with the tests in the WebAssign, Pearson, and Aleks environments.
